description: Fath (فتح, 'Victory') was a short-lived reformist daily on whose editorial board [Akbar Ganji](/people/akbar-ganji) and [Emadeddin Baghi](/people/emadeddin-baghi) served. Closed in the April 2000 crackdown; both Ganji (22 April) and Baghi (29 May) were arrested for their Fath and [Sobh-e Emroz](/orgs/sobh-e-emroz-newspaper) articles.
